content.text: How can I programmatically determine the canonical tautomer of a given chemical compound by scoring its possible forms?
What precise rule does the code use when multiple different tautomers end up sharing the exact same final computed score?
If scores are equal (`highest['score'] == score`), the function chooses the one whose SMILES comes first alphabetically. This ensures determinism regardless of other scoring criteria.
Got it, thanks for clearing that up!
